name: cannibal.live_world_daylight_high_threat_negative_mcw
description: Scenario 4 for cannibal camp night-raid live matrix: on the same daylight/no-cover McWilliams/Basecamp footing as the day-smoke pressure proof, the live local gate must classify maximum camp-adjacent threat as hold_off/non-combat instead of cannibal suicide-rush behavior. The fixture uses the already documented reviewer-visible relabeled camp-shaped cannibal_camp source footprint and daylight dispatch-cadence boundary; this scenario is a separated negative/control claim, not a new smoke-source breadth claim.

steps.label: post_load_daylight_high_threat_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for McWilliams cannibal daylight/high-threat negative fixture; this is startup/load evidence plus before-action screen proof, not feature closure by itself
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later daylight/high-threat local-gate artifacts cannot be credited.

steps.label: pass_one_turn_on_daylight_high_threat_boundary
steps.expected_visible_fact: one player pass-turn input has completed on the daylight/no-cover high-threat fixture; feature credit depends on the same-run debug artifact showing cannibal_camp posture=hold_off with threat=3, darkness_or_concealment=no, shakedown=no, and combat_forward=no
steps.failure_rule: If the pass-turn input is unproven or the same-run artifact lacks the cannibal daylight/high-threat hold_off local-gate line, this scenario is not product proof.

evidence_contract.claim: daylight/no-cover camp-adjacent high-threat pressure makes cannibals hold off instead of opening combat-forward or shakedown behavior
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for cannibal behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, pass-turn ledger, cannibal site match, daylight/no-cover state, threat=3 local-gate report, hold_off posture, non-shakedown artifact, or non-combat-forward artifact is missing or non-green.
